# Chapter 5: Food: agriculture, logistics, security  (~100 pp)
- 5.1 The agricultural system as engineered domain (15) · 5.2 Soil, water, fertilisers, pesticides (15) · 5.3 Mechanisation and precision agriculture (12) · 5.4 Food processing, cold chain, logistics (15) · 5.5 Food security and supply-chain resilience (15) · 5.6 Alternative protein and emerging food systems (12) · 5.7 Failure section: food-system failures (Irish famine, the dust bowl, banana panic, 2008 food crisis) (16)

**Archetype**: transport, balance, scaling. **Project**: trace one food product from farm to plate; identify engineering touch-points. **Exercises**: 25.
